title: R package development
code: # To run code Rscript -e "devtools::load_all(); code"  # To run all tests Rscript -e "devtools::test()"  # To run all tests for files starting with {name} Rscript -e "devtools::test(filter = '^{name}')"  # To run all tests for R/{name}.R Rscript -e "devtools::test_active_file('R/{name}.R')"  # To run a single test "blah" for R/{name}.R Rscript -e "devtools::test_active_file('R/{name}.R', desc = 'blah')"  # To redocument the package Rscript -e "devtools::document()"  # To check pkgdown documentation Rscript -e "pkgdown::check_pkgdown()"  # To check the package with R CMD check Rscript -e "devtools::check()"

title: R package development
text: Always use = assignment, never <-. 2-space indentation, 120-character line limit. snake_case functions variables, CamelCase R6 classes. calling function imported package foo write foo::bar() bar() Double quotes strings, explicit TRUE/FALSE (never T/F), explicit 1L integers. Use implicit return values functions. Prefer result = (...) ... else ... (...) { result = ... } else { result = ... } difference branches assigned value. User-facing API (exported functions, public R6 methods) must checkmate assert_*() argument checks. internal code, match existing level defensiveness. Use mlr3misc utilities appropriate: map(), map_chr(), invoke(), calculate_hash(), str_collapse(), %nin%, %??%. implementing something, read similar existing files first match established patterns. Always use # nolint next disable linters next line instead # nolint line.

title: R package development
text: Name file important contained function / class whitespaces, special chart filenames Usually one large function / class, per file, adding multiple smaller helpers ok

title: R package development
text: Derived classes must declare #' @include ParentClass.R roxygen header. controls Collate: field DESCRIPTION base classes load derived classes.

title: R package development
text: Use checkmate arg-checks Use data.table efficient table structures OOP-style use R6 Use cli format messages, warnings, errors prints

title: R package development
text: Tests R/{name}.R go tests/testthat/test_{name}.R. new code accompanying test. existing tests, place new tests next similar existing tests. Strive keep tests minimal comments. full test suite takes long time. run tests relevant changes devtools::test(filter = '^{name}').

title: R package development
text: Every user-facing function exported roxygen2 documentation. Wrap roxygen comments 120 characters. Write one sentence per line. sentence exceeds limit, break comma, “”, “”, “”, appropriate point. Internal functions roxygen documentation. Always re-document package changing roxygen2 comment. Don’t hand-edit generated artifacts: man/, NAMESPACE. Never edit README.md directly – generated README.Rmd. Always edit README.Rmd run devtools::build_readme() regenerate README.md. adding new S3 method (print.<ClassName>), always run devtools::document() afterwards re-generate NAMESPACE. Environment variables options documented package-level documentation (typically R/package.R). Roxygen templates live man-roxygen/. Use @template avoid duplicating common parameter descriptions. create new templates sections likely re-used. functions, always document return value (section #' @return). Bibliographic references go R/bibentries.R cited `r format_bib("key")`.

title: R package development
text: Every user-facing change given bullet NEWS.md. add bullets small documentation changes internal refactorings. bullet briefly describe change end user mention related issue parentheses. bullet can consist multiple sentences contain new lines (.e. line wrap). change related function, put name function early bullet. Order bullets alphabetically function name. Put bullets don’t mention function names beginning.

title: Automated Machine Learning for mlr3
text: Package website: release | dev mlr3automl Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) package mlr3 ecosystem. automatically selects suitable machine learning algorithm tunes hyperparameters given task. package includes 10 learners mlr3learners package, ranging simple models like glmnet powerful algorithms ranger xgboost. Leveraging mlr3pipelines package, constructs sophisticated preprocessing graphs multiple parallel branches, jointly optimized using mlr3tuning package. optimization driven Asynchronous Decentralized Bayesian Optimization (ADBO), enabling efficient scalable AutoML.

title: Fastai Auto — AutoFastai
text: Python learners like TabPFN fastai run via reticulate therefore need Python installation required packages. two ways provide : nothing let reticulate::py_require() install required packages ephemeral virtual environment automatically. Point RETICULATE_PYTHON environment variable Python installation required packages installed. recommend option 2 running many workers, avoids overhead downloading installing packages worker. Use install_python_learners() create conda environment required packages set RETICULATE_PYTHON returned Python binary. TabPFN learner additionally requires TABPFN_TOKEN environment variable download model weights.

title: Base AutoML Learner — LearnerAuto
text: learner_timeout (integer(1)) Timeout training predicting single learner. n_threads (integer(1)) Number threads used training single learner. memory_limit (integer(1)) Memory limit training single learner MB. limit shared across parallel workers, .e. divided number workers. devices (character()) Devices use model training. Possible values "cpu" "cuda". "cuda", learner trained GPU. large_data_size (integer(1)) Threshold data set size (number rows times number columns) large-data rules apply. Beyond threshold number parallel workers reduced remaining worker given proportionally threads memory. small_data_size (integer(1)) Threshold value data set size special rules apply. small_data_resampling (mlr3::Resampling) Resampling strategy use model training small data sets. initial_design_default (logical(1)) Whether use default design learner. initial_design_set (integer(1)) Number points use initial design set. initial_design_size (integer(1)) Size random, sobol lhs initial design. initial_design_type (character(1)) Type initial design used mbo. Possible values "lhs", "sobol", "random". "lhs" uses Latin Hypercube Sampling design. "sobol" uses Sobol sequence design. "random" uses random design. initial_design_fraction (numeric(1)) Fraction budget use initial design. resampling (mlr3::Resampling) Resampling strategy used tuning. terminator (bbotk::Terminator) Terminator criterion tuning. measure (mlr3::Measure) Measure used tuning. callbacks (mlr3tuning::CallbackAsyncTuning) Callbacks used tuning. store_benchmark_result (logical(1)) Whether store benchmark result. store_models (logical(1)) Whether store models. encapsulate_learner (logical(1)) Whether encapsulate learner. Change FALSE debug. encapsulate_mbo (logical(1)) Whether encapsulate tuning. Change FALSE debug. check_learners (logical(1)) Whether check learners compatible task. Change FALSE debug.

title: Base AutoML Learner — LearnerAuto
text: Redirects encapsulation final model fit. AutoML learner always trains main session, rush-based parallel tuning run inside encapsulated session. encapsulation method fallback learner instead applied final model fit follows tuning phase. final model fit fails, fallback learner trained instead. Without encapsulation, failed final model fit raises error. tuning phase guarded encapsulate_learner encapsulate_mbo parameters instead.

title: Classification AutoML Learner — LearnerClassifAuto
text: Python learners like TabPFN fastai run via reticulate therefore need Python installation required packages. two ways provide : nothing let reticulate::py_require() install required packages ephemeral virtual environment automatically. Point RETICULATE_PYTHON environment variable Python installation required packages installed. recommend option 2 running many workers, avoids overhead downloading installing packages worker. Use install_python_learners() create conda environment required packages set RETICULATE_PYTHON returned Python binary. TabPFN learner additionally requires TABPFN_TOKEN environment variable download model weights.

title: Regression AutoML Learner — LearnerRegrAuto
text: LearnerRegrAuto automated machine learning (AutoML) system regression tasks. combines preprocessing, switch multiple learners, hyperparameter tuning find best model given task.

title: Regression AutoML Learner — LearnerRegrAuto
text: Set options(bbotk.debug) run tuning main session. Set encapsulate_learner = FALSE remove encapsulation learner. Set encapsulate_mbo = FALSE catch errors mbo.

title: Regression AutoML Learner — LearnerRegrAuto
text: learner_timeout (integer(1)) Timeout training predicting single learner. n_threads (integer(1)) Number threads used training single learner. memory_limit (integer(1)) Memory limit training single learner MB. limit shared across parallel workers, .e. divided number workers. devices (character()) Devices use model training. Possible values "cpu" "cuda". "cuda", learner trained GPU. large_data_size (integer(1)) Threshold data set size (number rows times number columns) large-data rules apply. Beyond threshold number parallel workers reduced remaining worker given proportionally threads memory. small_data_size (integer(1)) Threshold value data set size special rules apply. small_data_resampling (mlr3::Resampling) Resampling strategy use model training small data sets. initial_design_default (logical(1)) Whether use default design learner. initial_design_set (integer(1)) Number points use initial design set. initial_design_size (integer(1)) Size random, sobol lhs initial design. initial_design_type (character(1)) Type initial design used mbo. Possible values "lhs", "sobol", "random". "lhs" uses Latin Hypercube Sampling design. "sobol" uses Sobol sequence design. "random" uses random design. initial_design_fraction (numeric(1)) Fraction budget use initial design. resampling (mlr3::Resampling) Resampling strategy used tuning. terminator (bbotk::Terminator) Terminator criterion tuning. measure (mlr3::Measure) Measure used tuning. callbacks (mlr3tuning::CallbackAsyncTuning) Callbacks used tuning. store_benchmark_result (logical(1)) Whether store benchmark result. store_models (logical(1)) Whether store models. encapsulate_learner (logical(1)) Whether encapsulate learner. Change FALSE debug. encapsulate_mbo (logical(1)) Whether encapsulate tuning. Change FALSE debug. check_learners (logical(1)) Whether check learners compatible task. Change FALSE debug.

title: Regression AutoML Learner — LearnerRegrAuto
text: Python learners like TabPFN fastai run via reticulate therefore need Python installation required packages. two ways provide : nothing let reticulate::py_require() install required packages ephemeral virtual environment automatically. Point RETICULATE_PYTHON environment variable Python installation required packages installed. recommend option 2 running many workers, avoids overhead downloading installing packages worker. Use install_python_learners() create conda environment required packages set RETICULATE_PYTHON returned Python binary. TabPFN learner additionally requires TABPFN_TOKEN environment variable download model weights.

text: Flexible automated machine learning (AutoML) system 'mlr3' ecosystem. Automatically selects suitable machine learning algorithm tunes hyperparameters given task. Constructs preprocessing pipelines multiple parallel branches using 'mlr3pipelines' jointly optimizes together learners using 'mlr3tuning'. optimization driven asynchronous decentralized Bayesian optimization.
